compiled_state.title: As a project onboarder, all enforcement infrastructure is initialized and working after onboarding completes
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Add all missing infrastructure initialization steps to onboarding: git pre-commit hooks (test gate, review gate), ticket system (orphan branch + smoke test), test index generation, CLAUDE.md with project-specific defaults and ticket command references, KNOWN-ISSUES template, CI trigger strategy question, and Jira bridge configuration question.
**Why**: A freshly onboarded project currently requires significant manual intervention before the plugin's enforcement mechanisms work. The test gate and review gate hooks are never installed, the ticket system is never initialized, and CLAUDE.md lacks the commands agents need to interact with tickets.
**Scope**:
- IN: Install git pre-commit hooks (test gate, review gate, executable guard) integrated with detected hook manager (Husky, pre-commit framework, or bare .git/hooks/); use git rev-parse --git-common-dir for worktree/submodule support; initialize ticket system (orphan branch, .tickets-tracker/) with push verification and warning on failure; perform ticket smoke test (create and read a ticket); run generate-test-index.sh when tests are present; generate CLAUDE.md with project-specific defaults and ticket command references; copy KNOWN-ISSUES template to .claude/docs/; ask about CI trigger strategy (don't assume PR-based); ask about Jira bridge (project key only — credentials remain env vars)
- OUT: Auto-detection and dialogue rewrite (Story 2f87-5437); artifact review UX (Story a84a-c539); generate-test-index.sh bug fix (dependency dde2-2b82)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, the onboarding skill installs git pre-commit hooks (test gate, review gate) integrated with the project's detected hook manager (Husky, pre-commit framework, or bare .git/hooks/)
  ← Satisfies: "Onboarding performs all infrastructure initialization"
- When this story is complete, the onboarding skill initializes the ticket system (orphan branch, .tickets-tracker/) with explicit push verification and performs a smoke test (create and read a ticket)
  ← Satisfies: "Onboarding performs all infrastructure initialization"
- When this story is complete, the onboarding skill generates CLAUDE.md with project-specific defaults and ticket command references, and copies the KNOWN-ISSUES template
  ← Satisfies: "Onboarding performs all infrastructure initialization"
- When this story is complete, the onboarding skill asks about CI trigger strategy rather than assuming PR-based workflow
  ← Satisfies: "Onboarding performs all infrastructure initialization"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Hook installation must work across 3 hook managers + worktrees/submodules — detection failures should degrade gracefully with clear warning
- [Security] Jira bridge config must only write project key to dso-config.conf — credentials must remain environment variables
- [Reliability] Orphan branch push failure must be caught and surfaced, not silently ignored
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Consideration: [Consumer Impact] check-onboarding.sh (line 46-53) checks for ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md as the artifact produced by /dso:architect-foundation. If story 7ed8-deba changes the output artifact name or location, check-onboarding.sh will report false failures. Verify artifact name compatibility or update check-onboarding.sh.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Done definition update: The generated CLAUDE.md is written to the host project root (not to plugins/dso/CLAUDE.md). The generated content includes ticket commands, test commands, and project-specific paths derived from dso-config.conf.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
